name: 14 Minute Maple Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the maple syrup, cream, and butter together until reaching a boil.
2. Continue cooking for an additional 9 minutes after reaching boiling point.
3. Remove from heat, add chopped nut meats and lemon extract.
4. Stir mixture for 5 more minutes.
5. Pour into buttered pans.
6. Allow to cool completely, then cut into squares.
